references.hebrew: כׇּל־הַמִּנְחָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר תַּקְרִ֙יבוּ֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה לֹ֥א תֵעָשֶׂ֖ה חָמֵ֑ץ כִּ֤י כׇל־שְׂאֹר֙ וְכׇל־דְּבַ֔שׁ לֹֽא־תַקְטִ֧ירוּ מִמֶּ֛נּוּ אִשֶּׁ֖ה לַֽיהֹוָֽה׃
references.english: No grain offering that you offer to G<small>OD</small> shall be made with leaven, for no leaven or honey may be turned into smoke as an offering by fire to G<small>OD</small>.

commentary_links.hebrew: כׇּל־הַמִּנְחָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר תַּקְרִ֙יבוּ֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה לֹ֥א תֵעָשֶׂ֖ה חָמֵ֑ץ כִּ֤י כׇל־שְׂאֹר֙ וְכׇל־דְּבַ֔שׁ לֹֽא־תַקְטִ֧ירוּ מִמֶּ֛נּוּ אִשֶּׁ֖ה לַֽיהֹוָֽה׃
commentary_links.english: No grain offering that you offer to G<small>OD</small> shall be made with leaven, for no leaven or honey may be turned into smoke as an offering by fire to G<small>OD</small>.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: אשר תקריבו לה לא תעשה חמץ הייתי
